title: Illusion bedrock
body:
Illusion Bedrock Mod
Ever wished bedrock wasn’t so… unbreakable? With the Illusion Bedrock Mod, you can craft and place fake bedrock that looks just like the real thing—but unlike the unbreakable original, this one can be mined!

Features:
🪨 Craftable Fake Bedrock – A perfect trick for pranks or secret builds. Looks identical to normal bedrock but can be broken with any pickaxe!

🕳 Fallthrough Illusion Bedrock – This variant is even trickier! It appears solid, but players (and mobs) will fall right through it. Perfect for hidden traps, secret entrances, or just messing with your friends!

⚒ Survival & Creative Friendly – Obtainable through crafting in survival mode or instantly in creative mode.
